chapter.title: On the Signs of Grace and Delusion,

paragraphs.text: On the Signs of Grace and Delusion, Written for the Confessor Longinos - Ten Texts 257 On Stillness - Fifteen Texts 263 On Prayer - Seven Texts 275 [V4] 212 St Gregory of Sinai On Commandments and Doctrines, Warnings and Promises; On Thoughts, Passions and Virtues, and Also on Stillness and Prayer:
